subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! This is Thy servant whom Thou hast related unto Thine own Self and made to be among the branches of Thy Tree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی هذا عبدک الذی نسبته الی نفسک و جعلته من افنان شجره
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @love of God, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
